outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Both Iran and US think they're winning the war. Both can't be right
outlets.summary: CNN analysis argues both sides are painting contradictory victory narratives. Trump claims Iran will capitulate; Iran says US overextended. With ceasefire expiring April 22, neither side appears willing to compromise.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Peace talks in doubt as U.S. seizes Iranian ship — ceasefire 'hanging by a thread'
outlets.summary: NPR reports ceasefire hangs in balance after Touska seizure, Iran's refusal to attend Round 2 talks, and Trump's statement that extension is highly unlikely. Vance heading to Islamabad anyway.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Vance says 'ball is in Iran's court' ahead of Pakistan trip as ceasefire deadline looms
outlets.summary: Fox News covers Vance's departure for Islamabad with Witkoff and Kushner. Vance says US put a lot on the table. Trump says extension highly unlikely, threatens resumed bombing.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Trump announces US Navy seized blockade-defying Iranian cargo vessel after 'blowing a hole' in engine room
outlets.summary: Trump announces USS Spruance seizure of Iranian ship Touska. First ship physically taken under US blockade. Iran fires drones at US ships in retaliation.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran says no talks with US for now, casting doubt over Pakistan efforts
outlets.summary: Pakistan ready for multi-day talks but Iran refuses to confirm attendance. FM Baghaei says US not serious. Pakistan's Field Marshal Munir doing shuttle diplomacy to persuade Iran.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: 'Resumption of hostilities': Seized ship pushes US-Iran ceasefire toward brink
outlets.summary: CNBC warns ceasefire is on the brink after Touska seizure, IRGC drone attacks on US warships, and Iran's refusal to participate in Round 2 talks. Oil surges as markets fear conflict resumption.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Israel set to mark Memorial Day under fragile ceasefires with Iran and Lebanon
outlets.summary: Israel enters Yom HaZikaron — 174 IDF soldiers and 79 civilians killed in past year. First wartime Memorial Day since Iran conflict. Milei to light Independence Day torch.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Memorial Day 2026: 174 IDF Soldiers, 79 Israeli Civilians Killed in Past Year
outlets.summary: Satellite imagery confirms 1,400+ buildings demolished in south Lebanon. IDF Jesus statue controversy sparks outrage. Second reservist killed by IED since ceasefire.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian says Trump 'in no place' to deprive Iran of nuclear rights
outlets.summary: Pezeshkian asserts Iran's right to nuclear technology. On X, wrote: Iranians do not submit to force. FM Baghaei: enriched uranium is as sacred as Iranian soil.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: FM Araghchi: Washington 'not serious' — no Round 2 while blockade continues
outlets.summary: FM Araghchi publicly confirms Iran will not participate in Islamabad Round 2. Says US posture including continued naval blockade and 'excessive demands' proves Washington is 'not serious about diplomacy.'
